component.name: Button
component.description: High-emphasis CTAs with **Property 1** colorways: **Note** (**Semantic/Activity/Note**), **Material** (**Semantic/Activity/Material**), **Job/Session** primary (**Brand/Accent** + shadow from **Brand/Primary**), plus **Button XL** (**Brand/Primary**). Each colorway has **Primary** (single) and **Primary+Delete** (row) except XL. Delete: white fill, `1px rgba(212,87,42,0.2)`, **Radius/8**, trash **Semantic/Status/Error/Text**.

figmaLayerNames.componentSet: Button (vertical stack of variant masters, 16px gap)
figmaLayerNames.label: field-book-cta-label (uppercase TEXT in single-button variants; primary side of +Delete)
figmaLayerNames.codeDataNames: `field-book-cta-xl` on XL button; `field-book-cta-with-delete` on the two-button row wrapper.

codeProps.variant: notePrimary | notePrimaryWithDelete | materialPrimary | materialPrimaryWithDelete | jobSessionPrimaryWithDelete | brandPrimaryXl
codeProps.primaryLabel: optional override of default uppercase label

notes: 2026-04-08: `FieldBookCtaButton` in `field-book-cta/` from Figma `1287:1563`; trash is inline SVG to match Edit Session sheet.
findings: 2026-04-08: Component set `1287:1563` — `VERTICAL` + `NO_WRAP`, 16px `itemSpacing`; `clipsContent` false on set and variant masters. Structural renames: `field-book-cta-label` on label TEXT nodes; `Button Primary+Delete` frames → `field-book-cta-primary`, `field-book-cta-delete`, `field-book-cta-delete-icon`. Single-TEXT variants (Primary / XL) keep label-only structure. No `flatten()` in automation. `FieldBookCtaButton.tsx` uses `data-name` for primary, XL, with-delete row, label, delete, and delete-icon wrapper.

2026-04-08: **Note** (`1279:351`), **Material** (`1283:351`), and **Edit Job, Session** (`1284:789`) use color-matched instances: **Primary Note** / **Primary+Delete Note**, **Primary Material** / **Primary+Delete Material**, **Primary+Delete Job/Session** respectively.
2026-04-08: Added **Job/Session** primary-only master `1808:1151` for parity with Figma; React uses `jobSessionPrimaryWithDelete` only until a sheet needs single-primary Job/Session.
